prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约12961→14293→24505→24126→21630名。2021至2022年小幅后移约1332名；2023年出现明显异常（位次大幅后移至24505名，可能与当年断档或批次合并有关）；2024年仍处于24126名高位；2025年回升至21630名，较2024年前移约2496名，显示报考热度有所恢复。近5年波动较大，2025年基准位次为21630名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划：2021年72人、2022年78人、2023年78人、2024年97人、2025年107人、2026年137人。2026年较2025年扩招30人，增幅约28%，为近年最大扩招幅度，将显著增加招生名额，缓解竞争压力，推动最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113位稳步上升至2026年第97位，排名持续提升反映学校综合实力和认可度增强，对考生吸引力上升，在一定程度上抵消扩招带来的竞争缓解效应；2022年声誉评价为偏负面（郑强书记管理受学生批评），但2023–2026年声誉文件中未出现该校重大负面舆情，近年声誉趋于平稳；未见明显投档断档记录（2023年位次异常可能为批次合并等结构性因素所致）；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；材料科学与工程、机械工程等传统工科实力较强，与招生专业中的化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程、机械设计制造及其自动化等形成对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电气、自动化等热门专业录取位次持续靠前（2025年最低位次约7000–8100名），社会热度较高；传统矿业、冶金、纺织类专业位次靠后（19000–21600名），热度偏低。贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，物理类按近年约69%占比估算约206310人，与2025年物理类207171人基本持平，考生规模变化不大，竞争压力总体稳定。省控线方面，贵州物理类本科批2024年380分、2025年387分，略有上升，反映整体竞争略有加剧；太原理工大学位于山西太原，距贵州较远，属于跨省报考；该校在贵州招生计划逐年增。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21630名、2026年大幅扩招28%、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力，部分抵消扩招效应）、考生规模基本持平、省控线略升等因素，预测2026年最低录取位次约24969名，波动区间24469–25469名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在24469–25469区间内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如接近24000名）可重点冲刺一档的电气、计算机等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如25000名以上）应以二档的机械、能源、人工智能等专业为主，三档的化工（学校王牌A-学科）、材料等作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 12961 → 14293 → 24505 → 24126 → 21630. From 2021 to 2022, there was a slight backward shift of about 1332 places; in 2023, a significant anomaly occurred (ranking sharply dropped to 24505, possibly due to a gap year or batch merger that year); in 2024, it remained at a high of 24126; in 2025, it rebounded to 21630, moving forward about 2496 places compared to 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity. There has been considerable fluctuation over the past 5 years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being 21630. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou for Physics Category: 72 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 97 in 2024, 107 in 2025, and 137 in 2026. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 30 students, an increase of about 28%, the largest expansion in recent years, which will significantly increase enrollment slots, alleviate competition pressure, and push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates, and to some extent offsetting the competition relief effect brought by expansion. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (Secretary Zheng Qiang's management was criticized by students), but from 2023 to 2026, no major negative public opinion about the university appeared in reputation documents, and its reputation has stabilized in recent years. No obvious record of admission gaps was observed (the ranking anomaly in 2023 may be due to structural factors such as batch mergers). In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Traditional engineering disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering and Mechanical Engineering are relatively strong, corresponding to majors like Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation in the enrollment plan, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Automation continue to have high admission rankings (minimum ranking around 7000–8100 in 2025), with high social popularity. Traditional majors like Mining, Metallurgy, and Textile Engineering have lower rankings (19000–21600), with low popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou is about 299,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 206,310 based on the recent approximate 69% proportion, basically unchanged from 207,171 in 2025, indicating stable competition pressure. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guizhou Physics Category undergraduate batch was 380 in 2024 and 387 in 2025, a slight increase, reflecting a slight intensification of overall competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, far from Guizhou, making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou has been increasing year by year.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 21630, the significant 28% expansion in 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness, partially offsetting the expansion effect), the basically unchanged candidate pool, and the slight increase in provincial control line, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 24969, with a fluctuation range of 24469–25469.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a predicted ranking in the 24469–25469 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., close to 24000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 25000), you should mainly target Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Energy, and Artificial Intelligence, with Tier 3 majors like Chemical Engineering (the university's flagship A- discipline) and Materials as stable choices.
